title: drosanthemum uniflorum
intro: Drosanthemum uniflorum, also known as the single-flowered daisy, is a succulent plant species native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Drosanthemum uniflorum include reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is often prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
